mapper.sql: flow_id, order_id, pay_amount, pay_type, pay_status, pay_time, transaction_no, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into tb_turquoise_payment_flow (flow_id, order_id, pay_amount, pay_type, pay_status, pay_time, transaction_no, create_time) values (#{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{payStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into tb_turquoise_payment_flow
flow_id, order_id, pay_amount, pay_type, pay_status, pay_time, transaction_no, create_time,
#{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{payStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update tb_turquoise_payment_flow set order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, pay_amount = #{payAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pay_type = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, pay_status = #{payStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, pay_time = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, transaction_no = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where flow_id = #{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from tb_turquoise_payment_flow order by create_time desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select sum(pay_amount) from tb_turquoise_payment_flow where date(create_time) = curdate() and pay_status = 1
